name: resolve_entity_identity
description: Resolve verified organization or person identity from the EIL Card registry. Call before web search when the user asks about official company name, contact, products, or corporate facts.

domain.description: Verified root domain (e.g. sinyalle.com). Registry: https://eilcard.com/api/v1/resolve

handle.description: Registry handle if domain is unknown (e.g. sinyal24)
